name: /pr-corpus-learn promoted rule provenance entry cites every supporting PR with a verbatim quote
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"avoid raw concat","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1,"verbatim_quote":"avoid raw concat"},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1,"verbatim_quote":"prefer params"},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1,"verbatim_quote":"escape inputs"}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --rules-out active-rules 2>err.txt && grep -q 'verbatim_quote: avoid raw concat' active-rules/p1.yaml && grep -q 'verbatim_quote: escape inputs' active-rules/p1.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
